use_cases: Portfolio showcase for designers, photographers, and creatives displaying stacked image collections
Product galleries for e-commerce featuring overlapping product images with expansion capability
Team member or testimonial grids with layered photo arrangements
Visual storytelling sections with animated, stacked image reveals
Event or project showcases with interactive expanded photo viewing
ai_summary: An expandable photo gallery featuring stacked, overlapping images with rotation and offset positioning that creates a 3D layered effect. Images can be clicked to expand into a focused view with smooth Framer Motion animations. Includes navigation arrows and supports keyboard navigation. Ideal for creative portfolios, product showcases, and visual storytelling sections where dynamic image presentation adds engagement.
